zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Strother於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，他的父親William de Strother31歲，母親Joan Corbet28歲。他於大約1320年與Constance de Lyham在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1354年被列為sheriff of northumberland。他去世於1381年在他的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Strother
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place somewhere in northeastern England formerly called (The) Strother, named with Middle English strother, struther, stroder ‘wooded marshland, marsh covered in brushwood’ (Old English strōther). This topographic term was current in Durham, Northumberland, and southern Scotland, but the place which gave rise to the surname has not been certainly identified. A locality called le strother is recorded near the city of Durham c. 1299, while another, recorded as le estrother in 1153–95, may have named Strother House in Boldon (Durham), unless the house was named from the surname. William de Strother was a tenant in nearby Offerton, in 1473, and he was probably a member of the Newcastle merchant-cum-gentry family from whom all or most modern bearers inherit their surname. In Northumberland, possibilities include Cold Strother in Kirkheaton and Haughton Strother, although there is no evidence for either place being known simply as The Strother. Alternatively, The Strother may have been a lost district name for either the marshy area around Cold Strother (north of the North Tyne) or that around Haughton Strother (on the south bank of the North Tyne), but again evidence is lacking. The (del) Strother family owned estates near (but not in) both places from at least the late 14th century. In southern Scotland, Struther in Lanarkshire and Struthers in Ayrshire and Fife (from the Older Scots equivalent of Middle English strother) might be considered, but for lack of supporting evidence it has been suggested that Scottish Strother is probably the attested Northumberland surname, whose bearers were major landholders on the Scottish border.
History: A William Strother is recorded in VA in 1673, probably the same man who, as William Strouder, was granted land in 1658.

variants.name: Struth
meanings: Scottish: topographic name from Older Scots stroth(e) ‘marshy place’. Compare Strother , Struthers .

variants.name: Struthers
meanings: English and Scottish (Lanarkshire): probably a variant of Strother , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Strother was born about 1295, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Strother, was 31 and his mother, Joan Corbet, was 28. He married Constance de Lyham about 1320, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1354, his occupation is listed as sheriff of northumberland. He died in 1381, in his hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Strother est né environ 1295, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Strother, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Corbet, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Constance de Lyham environ 1320, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1354, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of northumberland. Il est décédé en 1381, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Strother um 1295 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Strother 31 und seine Mutter Joan Corbet 28. Er hat um 1320 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Constance de Lyham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1354 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of northumberland aufgeführt. Er starb 1381 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Strother è nato il circa 1295 nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Strother, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Corbet, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Constance de Lyham circa 1320, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1354, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of northumberland. Morì nel 1381, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan de Strotherが約1295年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父William de Strotherは31歳，母Joan Corbetは28歳であった。約1320年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでConstance de Lyhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1354年，職業はsheriff of northumberlandと記録されている。彼は1381年に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Strother(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Strother(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Corbet(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Constance de Lyham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1354년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of northumberland이었다. 그는 1381년 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Strother nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Strother, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Corbet, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance de Lyham aproximadamente 1320, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1354, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of northumberland. Ele faleceu em 1381, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Strother родился около 1295 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Strother было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Corbet, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance de Lyham около 1320 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1354 году он работал по профессии sheriff of northumberland. Он умер в 1381 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1354 to 1357: mai le 1354 e o'o I le 1357

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan de Strother nació aproximadamente 1295, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Strother, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Corbet, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Constance de Lyham aproximadamente 1320, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1354, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of northumberland. Murió en 1381, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
